title: Cobblemon Mirian Fakemon Pack
description: An addon for cobblemon that adds fakemon that are featured in mirian region. (HEAVY WIP)
body:
a cobblemon addon that adds fakemon featured in the mirian region.

(WORK IN PROGRESS)
### **Fakemon featured**
**potle** (ground type)
How to install
This addon requires only [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon/)!
Download the .zip file and add it in both "resourcepacks" folder and "datapacks" folder of your world
and it should work just fine!
if it doesn´t please report the bugs in our discord server listed on the side (or the link under this)
[Discord](https://discord.gg/CMRuWdH9)
